name: UI Components
description: All Halogen UI components
sparql:
PREFIX gbk: <https://lambdasistemi.github.io/graph-browser/vocab/kinds#>
SELECT ?node WHERE { ?node a gbk:component }

name: PureScript Modules
description: All PureScript logic modules
sparql:
PREFIX gbk: <https://lambdasistemi.github.io/graph-browser/vocab/kinds#>
SELECT ?node WHERE { ?node a gbk:module }

name: FFI Bindings
description: All JavaScript FFI wrappers
sparql:
PREFIX gbk: <https://lambdasistemi.github.io/graph-browser/vocab/kinds#>
SELECT ?node WHERE { ?node a gbk:ffi }

name: JSON Schemas
description: All validation schemas
sparql:
PREFIX gbk: <https://lambdasistemi.github.io/graph-browser/vocab/kinds#>
SELECT ?node WHERE { ?node a gbk:schema }

name: Data Types
description: Core data type definitions
sparql:
PREFIX gbk: <https://lambdasistemi.github.io/graph-browser/vocab/kinds#>
SELECT ?node WHERE { ?node a gbk:type }

name: Design Concepts
description: Architectural concepts and principles
sparql:
PREFIX gbk: <https://lambdasistemi.github.io/graph-browser/vocab/kinds#>
SELECT ?node WHERE { ?node a gbk:concept }

name: FFI Boundary
description: Everything that crosses the PureScript / JavaScript border.

name: External Dependencies
description: Third-party libraries and frameworks the project depends on.

name: Validation Chain
description: What validates what — CI validators and their schema targets.

name: Data Pipeline
description: The full path from data loading through indexing, filtering, and rendering.

name: Leaf Nodes
description: Entry points and terminal dependencies — nodes with only one connection.

name: Hub Nodes
description: The most connected nodes — architectural load-bearing components.

name: Viewer Dependencies
description: Everything the Viewer component depends on (transitive).
sparql:
PREFIX gb: <https://lambdasistemi.github.io/graph-browser/vocab/terms#>
PREFIX gbe: <https://lambdasistemi.github.io/graph-browser/vocab/edges#>
SELECT DISTINCT ?node WHERE {
  <https://github.com/lambdasistemi/graph-browser/rdf/node/viewer> ?p ?node .
  ?node a ?type .
  FILTER(?p != <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#type>)
}

name: Graph Core
description: Pure graph operations: types, build, operations, search — no UI, no FFI.

name: Nodes by Kind
description: All nodes of a selected kind.
sparql:
PREFIX gbk: <https://lambdasistemi.github.io/graph-browser/vocab/kinds#>
SELECT ?node WHERE { ?node a gbk:$kind }

name: Nodes by Group
description: All nodes in a selected group.
sparql:
PREFIX gb: <https://lambdasistemi.github.io/graph-browser/vocab/terms#>
SELECT ?node WHERE { ?node gb:group "$group" }

name: Build & Validation
description: Nix build system, schemas, and CI validation pipeline.

name: UI & Rendering
description: The viewer component, graph operations, and Cytoscape rendering pipeline.

name: Nix Build Nodes
description: The flake, bundlers, and build outputs.
sparql:
PREFIX gbk: <https://lambdasistemi.github.io/graph-browser/vocab/kinds#>
SELECT ?node WHERE { { ?node a gbk:build } UNION { ?node a gbk:output } }

name: Validation Pipeline
description: CI validation workflow and schema nodes.

name: Viewer Component
description: The central Halogen component and its direct connections.

name: Decoding Layer
description: Graph decoding and type foundation.

name: FFI Rendering
description: Cytoscape FFI wrapper and the JS library.

name: Type Foundation
description: Graph.Types and its dependents.

name: Graph Build
description: Graph.Build indexing module.

name: Graph Operations
description: Neighborhood and subgraph algorithms.

name: Cytoscape Conversion
description: PureScript to Cytoscape.js element conversion.

name: Ontology Classes
description: All OWL/RDFS classes rendered as ontology nodes.

name: Class Hierarchy
description: Ontology classes that participate in subclass relationships.

name: Ontology Subtrees
description: A non-empty subtree beneath a selected ontology root class.
sparql:
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
SELECT DISTINCT ?node WHERE {
  ?class rdfs:subClassOf* ?ancestor .
  FILTER(isIRI(?class) && isIRI(?ancestor))
  BIND(CONCAT("owl-", LCASE(REPLACE(REPLACE(STR(?class), "^.*(#|/)", ""), "[^A-Za-z0-9]+", "-"))) AS ?node)
  BIND(CONCAT("owl-", LCASE(REPLACE(REPLACE(STR(?ancestor), "^.*(#|/)", ""), "[^A-Za-z0-9]+", "-"))) AS ?ancestorNode)
  FILTER(?ancestorNode = "$root")
}

name: Ontology Properties
description: Classes connected by object properties with declared domains and ranges.

name: Ontology Alignments
description: Classes touched by equivalentClass or equivalentProperty mappings.
